title: codereview pass #1: test helpers still ignore positive codes in submit_location_with_bridge and clear_network_location
description: In lichen/subsys/lichen/app_interface/app_interface.c:477 and :528, the test hook does  before returning injected ret from lichen_app_interface_test_fail_next_*. Positive codes (>0) are ignored and real HAL path executes. This was supposed to be fixed per project-LICHEN-520s. Other items (uninit, truncation validation via CBOR count patch+break, BUILD_ASSERT for VLA/stack in coap_keys.c:605, Y2K38 comments in app_interface.h:134 and :162) appear correctly addressed. No new bugs in core logic or missed edges in reviewed files+tests. P2 correctness.
close_reason: Fixed test helpers to handle all non-zero ret values consistently (updated setters and bridge checks to !=0); no positive->0 normalization. 3 codereview passes completed with all similar patterns fixed in scope (app_interface, coap_*.c, rpl, rust error handling/truncation/VLA via static+BUILD_ASSERT+checks). COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE fixed to lichen_coap_server across coap_*.c. Verified builds clean.
